name: Metric Equivalents for U.s. Measurements
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: All metric equivalents are approximate; they have been rounded
to the nearest metric equivalent for ease of use.
APPROXIMATE METRIC EQUIVALENTS FOR VOLUME
U.S. Volume Metric Measure Equivalent
1/8 teaspoon 0.5 milliliter
1/4 teaspoon 1 milliliter
1/2 teaspoon 2 milliliters
1 teaspoon 5 milliliters
1/2 tablespoon (T) 7 milliliters
1 tablespoon (T) 15 milliliters
2 tablespoons (1 fluid ounce) 30 milliliters
1/4 cup (4 tablespoons) 60 milliliters
1/3 cup 80 milliliters
1/2 cup (4 fluid ounces) 125 milliliters
2/3 cup 160 milliliters
3/4 cup (6 fluid ounces) 180 milliliters
1 cup (16 tablespoons) 250 milliliters
1 pint (2 cups) 500 milliliters
1 quart (4 cups) 1 Liter
APPROXIMATE METRIC EQUIVALENTS FOR TEMPERATURE
Fahrenheit Celsius
200 F 100 C
250 F 120 C
275 F 140 C
300 F 150 C
325 F 160 C
350 F 180 C
375 F 190 C
400 F 200 C
425 F 220 C
450 F 230 C
APPROXIMATE METRIC EQUIVALENTS FOR WEIGHT U.S.
Weight Metric Equivalent
1/2 ounce 15 grams
1 ounce 30 grams
2 ounces 60 grams
3 ounces 85 grams
1/4 pound (4 ounces) 115 grams
1/2 pound (8 ounces) 225 grams
3/4 pound (12 ounces) 340 grams
1 pound (16 ounces) 450 grams
APPROXIMATE METRIC EQUIVALENTS FOR DIMENSIONS
U.S. Metric Equivalent
Dimension Millimeters
1/16 inch 2 mm
1/8 inch 3 mm
3/16 inch 5 mm
1/4 inch 6 mm
3/8 inch 9 mm
1/2 inch 12.7 cm
3/4 inch 19 cm
1 inch 25.4 cm
1 1/2 inches 38 cm
2 inches 50 cm
3 inches 76 cm
4 inches 100 cm
5 inches 127 cm
9 inches 230 cm
11 inches 279 cm
